title: Move DuckDB::Database initialization from connect to adapter_initialize
description: The @duckdb_database ||= in connect() silently ignores database path on subsequent calls, breaking the connect contract and causing test_connection_error_mapping to fail. Move Database.open to adapter_initialize where it belongs, and have connect() only create connections.
close_reason: Moved DuckDB::Database.open from connect() to adapter_initialize. connect() now only creates connections.
